title: U.S. payrolls rose by 172,000 in May, much more than expected; unemployment at 4.3%
summary_full: Nonfarm payrolls were expected to increase by 80,000 in May while the unemployment rate held at 4.3%.
summary_public: Nonfarm payrolls were expected to increase by 80,000 in May while the unemployment rate held at 4.3%.
